title: Iceland’s Chief ‘Lava Cooler’ Is Bracing for the Next Volcanic Eruption
summary_full: Helgi Hjorleifsson, a firefighter, is a leader in a national experiment to steer rivers of lava away from important sites. Some called it crazy, but it worked.
summary_public: Helgi Hjorleifsson, a firefighter, is a leader in a national experiment to steer rivers of lava away from important sites. Some called it crazy, but it worked.
